name: Roasted Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Place about 1/8 inch of salt in the bottom of an 8x8x2-inch baking dish.
3. Put the garlic bulbs on top of the salt.
4. Fill the dish with more salt, leaving only the tips of the bulbs exposed.
5. Heat the dish in the oven for 45 minutes to 1 hour.
6. When the garlic is done, the tips will release a little oil.
7. Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for about 15 minutes.
8. Remove the bulbs from the salt, cut them in half horizontally, and squeeze out the paste.
